metadata.notes: Diagnostic PZU color caution baseline. Full boxes are report-only; manual sentinels are the gate. This is not accepted release-gating truth.

manualSentinels.description: True red wavy TB11 should survive near the KPP area.
Upper connected magenta symbol should resolve to 21_sym_02.
Second true red wavy TB11 should survive.
Long red L-family stick can be any reviewed L7/L10-L13 class here.
Second long red L-family stick can be any reviewed L7/L10-L13 class here.
Gray/black L3 text must not become final color pictogram output.
EW1 pictogram with red EW1 label should be detected visually.
EW1 pictogram should resolve to 18_EW1, not AW/L family.
EW1 pictogram should resolve to 18_EW1 in the middle stack.
EW1 pictogram should resolve to 18_EW1 in the upper stack.
This local pictogram area is not a valid 09_L9 detection.
Gray/black L3 text at this spot must not become final color output.
Second gray/black L3 text must not become final color output.
Manual review accepts either EW1 or EW2 at this uncertain evacuation sign ROI.
